title: scorzonera mollis f. microcalanthia
intro: Scorzonera mollis f. microcalanthia is a subspecies of the Scorzonera mollis plant, a perennial herb belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae), native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and expectorant effects, which make it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits of Scorzonera mollis f. microcalanthia include its ability to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to help lower blood pressure and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, teas, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal remedy.
